title: Validate CoAP request path before joining URI components
description: Trigger: public lichen_coap_request() is called with req->path == NULL. lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_client.c:244 dereferences req->path in the join loop, while wrapper APIs validate path before building requests. Impact: direct users of the public request API can crash the node with malformed parameters instead of receiving LICHEN_COAP_ERR_INVALID_PARAM. Validate req->path before allocation/path joining and document the required NULL-terminated component array contract.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
